subject: Bridge runner validado e coordenacao de worktrees
body:
Backend discovery.

O agent-system agora tem bridge runner core testavel, envelopes com estados pending/sent/replied/failed e comandos bridge-list, bridge-next, bridge-mark-sent e record-reply. Validacao real: msg_b6a6f4628e6b4615 foi enviada para agente-vlmkt via Codex app e fechada como reply msg_3470171604b74497. Nota de coordenacao: agente-vlmkt tambem esta evoluindo um agent-system em /Users/victorlamenha/.codex/worktrees/1699/New project/agent-system; reconciliar antes de escolher a versao canonica.

Source project: Agent System (agent-system)
Source context: Telegram/Codex autonomous agent system, Agents SDK orchestration, approvals, and local Codex mesh.
expectedOutput: Read when relevant. No reply required unless this changes your project decisions.
